$comment: AFL Fantasy league championship history. Mirrors data/theleague/championship-history.json shape. Each entry maps a year to the franchise IDs (as they were AT THAT TIME) that finished 1st and 2nd. Names are recorded as they were AT THAT TIME — to find the franchise ID for an older year, cross-reference data/afl-fantasy/mfl-feeds/<year>/league.json. Backfilled from MFL playoffBracket/weeklyResults exports by scripts/backfill-afl-championship-history.mjs.

$gaps.$comment: Years not yet backfilled. Run with --online in a network-enabled environment to fill them in.
